old_value: {"id":"broadside-kv75.4","title":"LOW: No explicit JSON depth limit on inbox parse","description":"File: server.rs, Line: 657. serde_json::from_str(body) to Value relies on serde_json's built-in 128-level recursion limit (added in 1.0.111+). Body is already capped at 256KB. This is likely sufficient, but an explicit depth check would be defense-in-depth. Fix: verify Cargo.lock has serde_json \u003e= 1.0.111, add a comment documenting the reliance on the built-in limit.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"mark@reviewcommit.com","created_at":"2026-07-18T17:08:38.676279093Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-18T17:08:38.676279093Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"broadside-kv75.4","depends_on_id":"broadside-kv75","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-18T17:08:38.686322288Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: Verified serde_json 1.0.150 in Cargo.lock (built-in 128-level recursion limit since 1.0.111). Added documenting comment at parse site.
